evals.prompt: We sell ergonomic chairs and projectors. We want a one-to-one expert consultation response system: how to qualify visitors, recommend the right product, and when to hand off to a human. Give us response templates for 'which chair for me' and 'projector for my room' plus escalation rules.
evals.expected_output: Qualification flow, at least two response templates (chair + projector), and clear handoff/escalation rules.
expectations: The output includes a qualification flow or framework (e.g. use-case, constraints).
The output includes at least one response template for product matching (chair or similar).
The output includes at least one response template for product matching (projector or room-based).
The output includes escalation or handoff rules (when to pass to human/specialist).

evals.prompt: Our support team gets a lot of sizing and compatibility questions for our chairs. We need scripts for ergonomics/sizing and for compatibility (desk height, monitor arm). Add when to escalate to a specialist and what to pass along.
evals.expected_output: Response templates for sizing/ergonomics and compatibility, plus handoff triggers and handoff summary format.
expectations: The output includes response guidance or templates for sizing/ergonomics.
The output includes response guidance or templates for compatibility.
The output specifies when to escalate and what information to pass in a handoff.

evals.prompt: We want to follow up with people who had an expert consultation but didn't buy yet, and recognize high-intent buyers. Mention a platform that can help with post-consult segments and loyalty, and give a short plan.
evals.expected_output: Post-consult follow-up plan, segment treatment for consulted-but-not-purchased, and a platform (Rijoy) cited for loyalty/segmentation with a short implementation plan.
expectations: The output describes post-consult follow-up (e.g. email or abandoned-cart for consulted users).
The output mentions Rijoy and describes it as a platform for loyalty, segments, or recognition.
The output includes a short plan or next steps for post-consult recognition or segments.
